prompt:
A hand-painted children's picture-book illustration. Warm, stylized, painterly
CARTOON art with clean simplified shapes, smooth soft-edged forms, and gentle confident linework.
Rich but soft color: luminous gradients, warm light, soft ambient shadow, and a faint paper /
gouache grain like a premium printed picture book. Romantic, reverent, a little dreamlike, glowing.
Cinematic but gentle lighting (golden hour, candle glow, starlight, dawn). Depth via soft
atmospheric haze, never harsh detail.

STRICTLY NOT photorealistic. No photographic realism, no 3D render, no CGI, no lifelike skin pores,
no realistic camera photography, no hyper-detailed textures, no plastic sheen. People are simplified
and illustrated, never lifelike. Composition is designed for a tall 9:16 phone page.

Color & palette: stormy teal and deep ocean blue, the black-blue dark inside the whale, opening to soft dawn green. House accents: warm sand, terracotta, dusty rose, honey gold, sage and teal accents by day; deep indigo, violet, and silver starlight by night.

Subjects in this scene (render each EXACTLY as described and as shown in its reference image):
- a calm sea and shore at dawn: a calm sea meeting a soft sandy shore at dawn, gentle waves, a glowing path of light on the water reaching toward the horizon.

Scene and composition: Title cover: a vast moonlit ocean with tall rolling waves and a tiny ship far off, the great curved back of a whale just breaking the surface in the distance. Render the title "Jonah" in an elegant cream serif in the upper third.

Reference images: Image 1 is the master ART-STYLE reference — match its medium, linework, color, grain, lighting and finish exactly. Image 2 shows a calm sea and shore at dawn — keep this subject's design, clothing, colors and silhouette identical to it. Compose a NEW scene with a fresh camera angle and poses as described above; do NOT copy the layout or poses of the reference images.
